title: bupleurum krylovianum
intro: Bupleurum krylovianum, also known as Krylov's hare's ear, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral compounds. The health benefits of Bupleurum krylovianum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of the common cold and flu, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Bupleurum krylovianum is often used in combination with other herbs to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be taken to promote overall well-being.
